Leo Messi gave an interview to Radio Argentina Radio 94.7 Club October and talked about his situation in the Argentine team.

Criticism when playing with the selection. "It Was customary to say things about me, They invent... They give Me when I'm not here. I Know you're talking a lot, but like it's been custom lately. I'm Not surprised at all. Many lies and invented things. It makes Me angry because people believe in what they say. The reality is that I come with a pubalgia before the December stop and I come training little, not playing all the games. "

Problems with the Pubalgia. "Pubalgia is complicated. It Doesn't get overnight. I'M feeling better, but I didn't clean it. I Have to take care of myself. "
Pressure in the selection: "If we were not in first round it was one of the biggest failures of the Selection. We Talked and we took it forward to improve the group. I'M very heated by the madness they say my dad handles the Selection, they say he has power to do things in the AFA. The family is the one who suffers. I Have friends, brothers who suffer for the lies they say. Anyone says anything. People buy that. Then I'm the son of a bitch. "

Failure in Russia's World Cup. "I Thought of locking myself up, grieving only with my family and forgetting all that I had lived. I Tried to isolate myself from everything a bit. Get Away from the Selection. "

Their role with Argentina. "I want to win something with the Selection. I'M Going to play all the important things. A Lot Of people told me not to come back, family, friends... My son asked me why do they kill you in Argentina? "
His commitment to Argentina: "We are a group that does not sell smoke, we do not always say that we love the Selection. I Don't always say it like they do others all the time. And Whoever wants to believe something else to do it. We don't sell smoke. We Are professionals but would not have gone to the Selection. If nobody makes me go. See If I'm going to leave the Selection for a baptism. I Came to my house and knew nothing about baptism. That'S a tremendous boludez. "

Scaloni: "I left the World Cup and never talked to anyone again. Scaloni called me several times and told me the project. I never talked to anyone so that Scaloni was the coach. "

Thread: Messi's interview with Radio Club Octubre.

Messi: "My 6-year-old asks me why they don't want me in Argentina."

Messi: "They said I was driving the AFA, that I was driving that 'club of friends' formed by Di Maria, Higuain and others. That makes me angry."

Messi: "We always had problems with local journalism, new things have been said every day, but we have allowed them to say anything and let them pass lies. That was a mistake."

Messi: "I surely want to win something with the national team, otherwise I would have stayed at home."

Messi: "But it's hard. My son is always on YouTube, and he saw a video and asked me 'Why are they demolishing you in Argentina?'"

Messi: "Our generation of players have been abused in Argentina. We play for our jersey, and we want to achieve something for the team. I will play in all the competitions and major matches for my team."

Messi: "My relationship with all the player in the team is great. They have to be calm, and they have to play the same way they play at the weekend with their clubs."

Messi: "I'm fully convinced that we will become strong with some patience."

Messi: "I, myself, would not choose my goal against Getafe as my best one. I would have chosen the one against Madrid in the Champions League semifinal, or the header against Man. United in the final."

Messi: "It's true that I don't talk much. I play, and that's what I like."

Messi: "I respect Juventus a lot. It's a big club and has now become more powerful with Cristiano. We hope to reach the final and don't care about facing them."

Messi (on the WC in Russia): "I thought about locking myself up, mourning only with my family, I wanted to forget what I had lived, to get away from the team a little, to let time pass and to calm down. The elimination hit me hard, finish the cycle of that way it was painful."

Messi: "I'm playing for myself, my family, and all those who enjoy what I do. And those who don't like me have to tolerate me for a while (laughs)."

Messi: "Recently I thought; Spain 2010 was a great team, they were phenomenal, but they also had luck in the World Cup final against the Netherlands, and before, they beat Paraguay on penalties, you often need those lucky moments and we never had them."

Messi: "They (young players) have to let go, but not play with me, but with the #Selection, that's why they are there, start giving them confidence, then everything will flow."
Messi: "I Will play all the important matches and tournaments with the NT, even though many people have advised not to return to the NT."

🚨重磅消息：摩連奴正式入主巴塞隆拿

有鑑於巴塞現任主帥華維迪的保守戰術為球隊帶來巨大的成功，管理層決定運用該戰術成為球隊未來的基礎理念。在經過幾番努力及漫長的協商下成功與前波圖、車路士、國米、皇馬、曼聯功勲教練摩連奴達成協議，由下季開始正式成為巴塞隆拿主帥，合約為期五年。摩連奴在訪問中透露將會把巴塞隆拿打做成一輛地上最強的超級大巴，貫徹地做好防務工作，令巴塞搖身一變成為全歐最牢不可破的球隊。而現任主帥華維迪來季將會調任為助教，利用其嫺熟的正選十一人輪換經驗，全力協助主教練和球隊達成三冠皇五連霸偉業！

Valverde: "There is never a suitable scenario to reserve a player like Messi. Every game has importance.”

“We care about the game tomorrow. Many people have their eyes on the Champions League and Atleti after, but Villarreal are just as important. Playing a team like them is never easy. There are 3 points to take.”

“The Champions League is a great illusion to the fans, to the players also ... but we don’t forget that it is a very difficult competition.”

“Historically, when Barça has won the Champions League, La Liga was won as well.”

"All the titles are just as far away as they are close to us right now. Everything is still yet undecided, now is when we have to show our qualities.”

“There are nine league games remaining. If we win six we are automatically champions. That’s the reality and our close objective."

"We will see tomorrow if Piqué will play or not."

“Griezmann? The case doesn’t destabilize anyone, neither Atleti nor us. It’s the usual, we're used to this.”

"We hope for the best Coutinho, the best Dembélé and the best Malcom.”

“There is not much tension between Coutinho and Malcom. Over the course of the season, we pick who is best suited.”

“Will Dembélé be back in time for Manchester? I don’t know, I can’t say exactly when. He may be back on Saturday or the Manchester match. I can’t determine when but his time to return is coming soon.”

“It is up to the doctors to see exactly when Dembélé is ready. We are in contact and there is good news for his progress.”
